zh.lifeSummary: 當Ghislaine de Ghent於大約1030年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，她的父親Lambert I van Gent32歲，母親Ermengarde de Flandre27歲。她和Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer至少有2個兒子。她去世於1059年在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯沙吉莫享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ghislaine de Ghent于大约1030年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，她的父亲Lambert I van Gent32岁，母亲Ermengarde de Flandre27岁。她和Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer至少有2个儿子。她去世于1059年在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯沙吉莫享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ghent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gent
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Ghant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ghent  , a habitational name for someone from Ghent in Flanders. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ghislaine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French: oblique case of   Giselle  , in a spelling that suggests Dutch or Flemish influence.

variants.name: Ghislain
meanings: Of recent origin, or at any rate a recent introduction to the English-speaking world. It is evidently a revival of the Old French oblique case of   Giselle  , in a spelling that suggests Low German, Dutch, or Flemish influence.

en.lifeSummary: When Ghislaine de Ghent was born about 1030, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Lambert I van Gent, was 32 and her mother, Ermengarde de Flandre, was 27. She had at least 2 sons with Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer. She died in 1059, in Saint-Omer, Calvados, Normandy, France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ghislaine de Ghent est née environ 1030, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Lambert I van Gent, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Flandre, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer. Elle est décédée en 1059, à Saint-Omer, Calvados, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ghislaine de Ghent um 1030 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lambert I van Gent 32 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde de Flandre 27. Sie hatte mit Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1059 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Saint-Omer, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ghislaine de Ghent è nata il circa 1030 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Lambert I van Gent, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde de Flandre, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer. Morì nel 1059, nel Saint-Omer, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Gent, Oost-Vlaanderen, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェント
ja.lifeSummary: Ghislaine de Ghentが約1030年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Lambert I van Gentは32歳，母Ermengarde de Flandreは27歳であった。彼女はOuvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omerとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1059年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスサイント-オマーで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ghislaine de Ghent(이)가 대략 1030년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lambert I van Gent(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde de Flandre(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1059년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 세인트-머에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ghislaine de Ghent nasceu aproximadamente 1030, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Lambert I van Gent, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Flandre, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer. Ela faleceu em 1059, em Saint-Omer, Calvados, Normandie, França, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ghislaine de Ghent родилась около 1030 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Lambert I van Gent было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Flandre, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer. Она умерла в 1059 г. в местности сеинт-омир, калвадос, норманди, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ghislaine de Ghent nació aproximadamente 1030, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Lambert I van Gent, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Flandre, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Ouvri 'Rabel' de Saint-Omer. Murió en 1059, en Saint-Omer, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 30 años.
